companion_files.name: PLAN.md
companion_files.content:
# Plan - Discover Provider Gap-Fill Tightening

## Document Status

- Last updated: 2026-02-19
- Feature: Discover Weekly provider source tightening (local-first playback)
- Scope: Frontend discover gap-fill assignment + targeted tests/docs
- Planning maturity: `Detailed Implementation Plan` complete

## Goal

Ensure Discover Weekly playlist playback prefers local library tracks when available, and only uses TIDAL/YouTube gap-fill for tracks that are unavailable locally.

## Detailed Implementation Plan (Atomic Tasks)

### Status Legend

- `Pending`: Not started
- `In Progress`: Actively being worked
- `Complete`: Finished with completion summary

### Task 1: Isolate and tighten provider slot assignment logic
- Status: Complete
- Deliverable: Provider assignment only considers gap-fill-eligible tracks (unavailable local tracks), while preserving existing slot caps.
- Completion summary: Moved provider slot assignment to `frontend/features/discover/utils/providerGapFill.ts`, changed candidate selection to `available === false`, and reduced provider share from 30% to 20% (`PROVIDER_SHARE = 0.2`) while retaining the existing max slot cap.

### Task 2: Add targeted unit coverage for provider assignment behavior
- Status: Complete
- Deliverable: Unit tests proving local tracks are not converted to streaming sources and unavailable tracks can still be gap-filled within cap logic.
- Completion summary: Updated `frontend/features/discover/hooks/useDiscoverProviderGapFill.test.ts` to validate local-first behavior plus slot-capped assignment for unavailable tracks; test script passed with `node --import ../backend/node_modules/tsx/dist/loader.mjs`.

### Task 3: Update discover UX copy/changelog and verify
- Status: Complete
- Deliverable: How-it-works text and changelog updated to reflect local-first behavior; targeted tests/commands run and summarized.
- Completion summary: Updated discover copy in `frontend/features/discover/components/HowItWorks.tsx` and changelog entry in `CHANGELOG.md`; verified provider gap-fill tests pass and confirmed `useDiscoverActions.test.ts` remains blocked in this worktree due missing `react` dependency.
